title: helianthemum virgatum subsp. africanum
intro: Helianthemum virgatum subsp. africanum is a plant species commonly known as Rockrose or African Rockrose, belonging to the family Cistaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Helianthemum virgatum subsp. africanum typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, or topical creams for medicinal purposes.
